wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Juzu Bracelet|2}}
{{R|Juzu Bracelet||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. See also {{2|Unknown Location}}.

== Sources ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.

* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions ==
* Will not spawn when using the {{2|Custom Mode}} modifier {{2|Custom Mode#DeadlyEvents|Deadly Events}}.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Juzu Bracelet to the game.
